revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[:Category:9世紀の各国|← 9世紀]] | [[:Category:11世紀の各国|11世紀 →]] {{Commonscat|10th century by country}} Category:10世紀|か...'
revision.text:
[[:Category:9世紀の各国|← 9世紀]] | [[:Category:11世紀の各国|11世紀 →]] {{Commonscat|10th century by country}}
[[Category:10世紀|かつこく]] [[Category:各世紀の国]]

revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
Adding [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Moving from [[Category:New pages]] to [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Removing from [[Category:Attempting to force efresh]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[commons" to "[[Category:Tier 3 Categories with commons links]][[commons"
Bot: tag Tier‑3 cat with no enwiki
Text replacement - "Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki" to "Tier 3 Categories"
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]][[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]]"
Text replacement - "[[en:" to "[[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]][[en:"

revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:10th century| Country]] [[Category:Centuries by country]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Category:10th century by country]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]][[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:10世紀の各国]] [[ar:Category:القرن 10 حسب البلد]] [[az:Category:X əsrdə ölkələr]] [[ba:Category:Илдәр буйынса X быуат]] [[be:Category:X стагоддзе паводле краін]] [[bn:Category:দেশ অনুযায়ী ১০ম শতাব্দী]] [[bs:Category:10. vijek po državama]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with commons links]][[commons:Category:10th century by country]] [[cy:Category:10fed ganrif yn ôl gwlad]] [[da:Category:900-tallet efter land]] [[el:Category:10ος αιώνας ανά χώρα]] [[es:Category:Países en el siglo X]] [[eu:Category:X. mendea herrialdearen arabera]] [[fa:Category:سده ۱۰ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[fr:Category:Xe siècle par pays]] [[hy:Category:10-րդ դար ըստ երկրի]] [[id:Category:Abad ke-10 menurut negara]] [[ka:Category:X საუკუნე ქვეყნის მიხედვით]] [[ko:Category:나라별 10세기]] [[ku:Category:Sedsala 10an li gorî welatan]] [[mk:Category:10 век по земја]] [[ms:Category:Abad ke-10 mengikut negara]] [[no:Category:900-tallet etter land]] [[pt:Category:Século X por país]] [[ro:Category:Secolul al X-lea după țară]] [[ru:Category:X век по странам]] [[sl:Category:10. stoletje po državah]] [[sv:Category:900-talet efter land]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 10. yüzyıl]] [[uk:Category:X століття за країною]] [[ur:Category:دسویں صدی بلحاظ ملک]] [[vi:Category:Thế kỷ 10 theo quốc gia]] [[zh:Category:10世紀各國]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]]
